summary: Updated implementation plan: 30 micro-scenes × 3 seconds each = 90 seconds total. Each scene is a single hard visual cut with one sentence of narration. Organized into 7 acts (Hook, What It Does, Glasswing, Developers, PMs, Reddit Reacts, Close). One background image per scene (30 total). Pipeline generates 30 MP3 + 30 JSON word-timing sidecars. Maximum cut rate for viewer retention.
